Class GenericConfig

java.lang.Object
configs.GenericConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Config
public class GenericConfig extends Object implements Config
Reflection-based configuration loader that wires agents from a text file.

Each agent entry in the configuration file occupies three lines:

  1. Fully qualified agent class name
  2. Comma-separated input topic names (subscriptions)
  3. Comma-separated output topic names (publish registrations)

Agents are instantiated via reflection, wrapped in a ParallelAgent (queue capacity 10), and wired to the TopicManagerSingleton topic registry. The configuration file is searched in multiple locations: the given path, user.dir, config_files/, parent directories, and the classpath.

Usage: Call setConfFile(String) then create(). Call close() to unsubscribe all agents and shut down parallel wrappers.

See Also:
  • Config
  • ParallelAgent

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericConfig

      public GenericConfig()

  • Method Details

    • setConfFile

      public void setConfFile(String path)
      Sets the path to the configuration file.

      Must be called before create(). The path may be absolute or relative; multiple search locations are tried at load time.

      Parameters:
      path - the filesystem or classpath path to the configuration file

    • create

      public void create()
      Reads the configuration file, instantiates agents, and wires them to topics.

      If agents were previously loaded, close() is called first. Each agent is wrapped in a ParallelAgent and subscribed/registered on the specified topics.

      Specified by:
      create in interface Config
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the configuration file path was not set, the file format is invalid (line count not divisible by 3), or the file cannot be read
      RuntimeException - if agent instantiation via reflection fails

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the display name of this configuration loader.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Config
      Returns:
      "Generic Config"

    • getVersion

      public int getVersion()
      Returns the version of this configuration loader.
      Specified by:
      getVersion in interface Config
      Returns:
      1

    • close

      public void close()
      Unsubscribes all wired agents from topics and closes their parallel wrappers.

      Clears the internal wiring list so a subsequent create() starts fresh.

      Specified by:
      close in interface Config
